premarket_brief:
# PRE-MARKET GAME PLAN | 2026-06-03

**Market Tone:** Flat open with SPY/QQQ at parity; VIX 20 suggests moderate volatility. Bull regime intact but thin breadth (50%) signals caution—expect consolidation ahead of NFP in 2 days.

**Positions to Watch:** AXON/ARM leading (+2%+). Monitor for profit-taking reversals; hold through strength but tighten stops if either breaks intraday support.

**Top Entry:** DE (brain score 120). Buy on dip to 5-min support or breakout above pre-market resistance; tech strength favors entry.

**Risk:**
